purpose: Make the current 92-task closed set reproducible and expose reusable mechanism/syntax assets for same-type tasks.

claim_boundary.closed_set_92: Can be reported as closed-set completion with provenance.
claim_boundary.cold_start: Must not claim 92/92 cold-start, because 27/92 use teacher replay or teacher-derived spectrefix.
claim_boundary.generalization: Must be validated on benchmark-v2 or later held-out perturbation tasks.

expected_reproducibility_checks.closed_set_92_audit: 92/92 accepted entries with Spectre-compatible evidence and explicit provenance
expected_reproducibility_checks.benchmark_v2_template_transfer: 30/30 EVAS and 30/30 Spectre when using slot-bound public-prompt materializer
